# slug: # Curated cross-repo benchmark corpus. Each row drives one
#   - Small lib, medium app, monorepo — three scale points.
#   - Mix of languages sigil parses with high confidence (Rust, Python,
#   - Stable pinned refs so results are reproducible.
#   - Small clone depth (--depth 200) keeps the run under ~3 minutes
# To re-run at the same anchor: `./evals/cross_repo.sh`
# To add a repo: append a row, keep the tab-separated layout.
